title: State Manager Optimize Executor Schema
description: Optimize state_manager modules for production builds

transpiledDirs.description: List of transpiled tree paths (relative to project root) whose state_manager modules should be optimized for production: replace each {esm,cjs}/__internal/core/state_manager/index.js with a re-export from prod/, then remove every entry inside state_manager/ except index.js and prod/.
